message:
Add hidden filtering to types and all query functions

- Add hidden: boolean to SessionMeta type
- Add includeHidden parameter to getProjects, getAllSessions,
  getSessionsByProject, and searchSessions
- Queries filter out hidden items by default (hidden = 0)
- Session counts in getProjects respect hidden filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
